Video.summary: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 9, Poland

Video.summary: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 10, Hungary

Video.summary: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 11, Zambia

Video.summary: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 12, Romania

Video.summary: The next stage of the competition takes place in Lithunia and world records are once again broken!
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 13, Lithunia

Video.summary: Episode 14 takes place in Estonia where drama and world records will be seen again
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 14, Estonia

Video.summary: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)

Image.alt: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)

Video.summary: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)

Image.alt: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)

Video.summary: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway

Video.summary: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany

Video.summary: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 3, Holland

Video.summary: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland

Video.summary: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria

Video.summary: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia

Video.summary: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia

Video.summary: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland

Video.summary: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria

Video.summary: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania

Video.summary: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship

Image.alt: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship

Video.summary: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania

Video.summary: The next stage of the SCL takes place in Holland with events such as the Atlas Stones and Truck Pull being witnessed
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 5, Holland

Video.summary: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 6, Latvia

Video.summary: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 7, Portugal

Video.summary: Episode 8 takes place in 36 degree heat in Croatia and sees the return of Krzysztof Radzikowski after a 2 month absence due to injury
Video.title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 8, Croatia
